positive: A minimalist, high-contrast stylized illustration of a bioluminescent nocturnal cityscape, viewed from a slightly elevated, central perspective. The scene features geometric silhouettes of futuristic buildings and natural elements like stylized trees and hovering orbs of light. Dominant colors are deep sapphire blue, ethereal cyan, and pops of neon electric lime and magenta. Use a clean, graphic, stencil art style with sharp edges and solid color fills. The overall composition must be highly repeatable and centered, suitable for screen printing on clothing. Perfect symmetry and visual balance are key. Atmospheric, dreamy, vaporwave aesthetic, designed for apparel print, vector graphic style.
negative: blurry, low detail, grainy, watermark, text, logo, signature, artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noisy, messy, photographic, realistic, gradient, sketch, watercolor
